TEMPLATE_NAME: Multi-Cloud Data Mesh with Secure Sharing
DESCRIPTION: Multi-Cloud Data Mesh: Best practices: Domain-oriented ownership per cloud, Database Roles for sharing (not account roles), CURRENT_ACCOUNT in policy conditions for shares, Reader Accounts with resource monitors for external consumers, Cross-region replication for global access, unified governance with tags and masking policies.
